title: Fix JS http-to-file-access alert #26
description: Prevent raw HTTP telemetry payload persistence to disk and log sanitized metadata only.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started. Updating console telemetry endpoint logging so raw HTTP payload data is not persisted to disk; only sanitized metadata will be logged.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Completed. Removed raw HTTP telemetry payload persistence in console server logs; file logging now records sanitized metadata only.
